task_objective: Implement docs/plans/audit_runtime_hardening.md against the audit findings in /tmp/ludusavi_audit_issues.md.
design_decisions: Kept all changes in first-party SDH-ludusavi code and did not modify vendored pyludusavi.
Added a reentrant service state lock for state persistence, cache mutation, and lazy match refresh coordination.
Kept operation serialization for lazy match refresh by routing through _run_locked.
Normalized empty installed app ID strings to an empty marker so all-games-uninstalled changes invalidate cache.
Replaced recursive per-process ps calls with one process table snapshot and root-only fallback when ps fails.
Removed the custom _run_blocking wake pipe while preserving context propagation, thread-safe completion, and cancellation logging with a bounded async wait.
Limited four-character fuzzy matching to configured Ludusavi game names and boundary-safe launcher names.
Wrapped frontend lifecycle start/exit RPC flows and process resume with explicit error logging and status-strip cleanup.

results.targeted_tests: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_service.py tests/test_main.py tests/test_matching.py tests/test_frontend_static.py -> 119 passed
results.ty_check: ./run.sh uv run ty check py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/ -> passed
results.frontend_verify: ./run.sh pnpm run verify -> passed after rerun with network access for pnpm audit
